text:
— Eligibility Group Code — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: The eligibility group applicable to the Medicaid beneficiary based on the eligibility determination 
process, in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 01 = Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives 
02 = Transitional Medical Assistance 
03 = Extended Medicaid due to Earnings 
04 = Extended Medicaid due to Spousal Support
